twc_daily.narrative: Strong to severe thunderstorms. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 60s.
Mostly cloudy. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the mid 60s.
Morning thunderstorms. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 70s.
Partly cloudy with a stray thunderstorm. Highs in the mid 80s and lows in the upper 60s.
Showers and thunderstorms late. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 60s.
Isolated thunderstorms. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 60s.
Thunderstorms. Highs in the upper 60s and lows in the mid 50s.

nws_periods.name: Today
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 83. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_periods.name: Tonight
nws_periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 10pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 4am. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 62. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
